kept.text:
This is insane.🤯

Claude Code users don’t even know this exists yet.

You’re still asking
“which model codes better?”

That’s outdated.

The real move = make them compete.

OpenAI just dropped an official Codex plugin for Claude Code —
and now you can call Codex inside Claude.

This isn’t a feature.
It’s a workflow upgrade.

3 commands. All lethal:

→ /codex:review
Scans uncommitted changes or diffs.
Clean. Fast. No noise.

→ /codex:adversarial-review
This is where it gets serious.
It questions your decisions:

“Why this caching?”
“Race condition?”
“What breaks at scale?”

You can control how aggressive it gets.

→ /codex:rescue
Claude stuck?
Hand it over to Codex mid-task.
--resume continues exactly where it stopped.

And then the real weapon: Review Gate

Claude finishes → Codex auto-reviews →
Finds issues? It blocks.

No silent bugs. No guesswork.

For anything high-risk:

• Auth
• Infra scripts
• DB migrations
• Data-sensitive logic

Adversarial mode = unfair edge.

Claude writes.
Codex challenges everything.

That tension builds better code.

Stop choosing models.

Make them fight. 

(repo link in comments)

quoted_tweet.text:
Codex App 才是最适合普通人上手的 AI 工具。

功能全面、界面简单易懂。不用一开始就折腾终端和命令行，也能轻松覆盖学习、工作和 vibe coding 等常见场景。

入门 Codex App 必须了解的五件事:

1、左侧栏工作区分 Projects 和 Chats，结构清晰。 Projects 对应真实文件夹，适合按项目管理问答、文件和任务；Chats 用来记录零散问答。
小 tip：快捷键 Cmd+G 可快速搜索聊天会话

2、支持多任务并行处理。你可以同时推进不同项目，并在左侧栏清楚掌握任务进度和状态。

3、Plugins包含外部工具和skill。外部工具指 GitHub、Notion、Gmail 这类第三方工具的接入；Skill指可复用的工作流，自己创建或用别人现成的都行。

4、Automations 支持将重复性任务设成定时自动执行。

5、内置终端、浏览器、文件预览功能，一个 App 满足所有需求，不用到处切换。

kept.text:
Sam Altman is unconstrained by the truth.

Ronan Farrow's New Yorker investigation reveals that OpenAI's own board fired him after Ilya Sutskever compiled secret memos documenting his consistent pattern of lying. 

He deceived executives about safety protocols, pitted them against each other, hid financial conflicts, and starved the safety team while racing toward profit and power. 

The company ditched its founding nonprofit mission to protect humanity from AGI in favor of reckless commercialization.

We are racing toward superintelligent AI with a proven deceiver at the wheel. 

OpenAI and Sam Altman must be stopped before their lies doom us all.

quoted_tweet.text:
While alternative coding harnesses may have short term lift, they will be bitter lesson’d away. I am bearish on any harness that doesn’t come from the lab whose model you are using. You’re fighting against post-training.

To put a finer point on this, you know how like, ioctls are like “huh that's weird but I guess whatever it's what we've got we can work with that”? It is exact the same with like, the particular JSON construction the Codex shell tool uses.

The model used to mangle nested quotes in this monstrosity RPC all the time but now it does not and it does not matter that the API is bad because billions of failed invocations are used to train to the harness we have, not the harness we deserve.

kept.text:
GPT Image 2疑似“吞”下了GPT-4o，OpenAI没把它当“生图”模型训练
OpenAI 很可能已经不在“纯扩散模型”这条主赛道上了。他们已经把图像生成从“美术课”调到了“语文课”——用一个能读懂指令、能记住上下文、能理解物体关系的 LLM 主导语义规划，至于最后一步的像素生成，可能由扩散组件或其他解码器完成。
而这个LLM，极大可能是GPT-4o。

quoted_tweet.text:
We already use Codex for coding on my eng and data science team, but my sales/marketing/cs team has been jamming with Claude Cowork.

Now having them experiment with Codex, we could end up being all in on Codex across-the-board.

One note, I've seen some confusion on how to get started with Codex if you want to use the Cowork-like features.

Make sure to go into Settings and change the "Work mode" from "For coding" to "For everyday work" 

Safe to say @thsottiaux and team are absolute cooking right now 🔥

𝗔𝗜 𝗔𝗖𝗖𝗘𝗦𝗦 𝗜𝗦 𝗕𝗘𝗜𝗡𝗚 𝗥𝗘𝗣𝗥𝗜𝗖𝗘𝗗 — 𝗔𝗡𝗗 𝗕.𝗔𝗜 𝗜𝗦 𝗟𝗘𝗔𝗗𝗜𝗡𝗚 𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗦𝗛𝗜𝗙𝗧 

AI didn’t suddenly get cheaper.

Access did.

And https://t.co/Seqm7NN2lU just pushed that shift to the extreme 👇

TRUE 50% COST REDUCTION (NOT MARKETING)

This is as direct as it gets:

• Recharge once → Get a 1:1 match
• $100 → $200 credits
• $500 → $1,000 credits

No hidden mechanics. No dilution.

Same models. Half the effective cost.

REAL MODELS. ZERO COMPROMISE

This isn’t a wrapper layer.

You’re interacting with:

• Official APIs from Anthropic, OpenAI, Google
• Claude Opus, GPT-5.5, Gemini
• Full-speed, full-capability access

No throttling. No “lite” versions.

You save on cost—not performance.

🔁 NOT A ONE-OFF — ONGOING SUBSIDY STRUCTURE

This isn’t just a first-time hook:

• Multiple recharges qualify
• Up to $100 cumulative bonus per user
• Continuous participation = continuous benefit

This is designed to build usage habits, not just attract clicks.

⏳ $10,000 DAILY POOL = REAL URGENCY

• Resets every day
• First come, first served
• Early users capture the most value

Miss timing → miss allocation.

Simple.

⚡ ZERO MARKUP + PLATFORM SUBSIDY

Here’s the real twist:

https://t.co/Seqm7NN2lU isn’t just offering lower prices.

It’s:

• Reselling official APIs at zero markup
• Adding its own subsidy layer on top

Result?

Official-level AI access… at below-official cost.

📊 WHAT THIS CHANGES (THIS IS THE BIG PART)

When AI costs drop by 50%:

• Same budget → 2x output
• Agent operations → significantly cheaper
• Automation → far more scalable
• Experimentation → faster + less risky

This doesn’t just affect pricing.

It changes behavior.

FROM AI TO AI EXECUTION

Now layer in what https://t.co/Seqm7NN2lU is building:

• “Justin’s Brain” → AI-driven trading intelligence
• BAIClaw → on-chain execution capability
• AI interacting directly with markets

This is the transition point:

From AI as a tool → AI as an operator

WHO BENEFITS FIRST?

• Developers → cheaper iteration cycles
• Creators → higher output at same cost
• Web3 users → AI + capital + execution loop forming

This is where efficiency compounds.

⚠️ BUT THIS WON’T LAST FOREVER

Let’s be clear:

• Max $100 bonus per user
• $10,000 daily pool cap
• Time + demand limited

This is early-stage subsidy mechanics.

𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗕𝗜𝗚𝗚𝗘𝗥 𝗦𝗜𝗚𝗡𝗔𝗟

Competition is shifting.

It’s no longer just:

“Who has the best model?”

It’s now:

Who controls access
Who enables execution
Who reduces cost at scale

𝗙𝗜𝗡𝗔𝗟 𝗧𝗔𝗞𝗘

This isn’t just a discount.

It’s a structural shift:

✔️ Lower-cost AI
✔️ Higher usage potential
✔️ Real-world execution capability

AI is entering its “low-cost + executable” phase.

The real question is:

When others are running AI agents at half the cost…

Are you still operating at full price?

kept.text:
本地跑的 AI 研究助手——自动搜资料、写总结、标引用，数据加密不出本机。

https://t.co/Iil2uqZgp1

Local Deep Research 是个本地部署的 AI 研究工具，Ollama、OpenAI、Anthropic 这些模型都能接，arXiv、PubMed、SearXNG 等十几个搜索引擎随便选。

SimpleQA 基准跑出约 95% 准确率，快搜、深研、出报告三种模式按需切换，还加了个 LangGraph 自主代理策略。

tweet.text:
【実は】
OpenAIってClaude Code用の公式プラグインをリリースしてる😳
その名も
ーー codex-plugin-cc
何ができるかというと👇
https://t.co/Nk1Jdkg1DS
・Claude Codeの中からCodexを直接呼べる
・3つのコマンドで完結
①/codex:review → コードレビュー
②/codex:test → テスト生成
③/codex:refactor → リファクタリング
つまり
Claude Code × Codex の「使い分け」じゃなく
「融合」が公式に始まった。
このプラグイン以外にも入れるべき拡張はまだある。9,000件から厳選した36選はこれ👇

tweet.text:
다음주 실적 발표 기업들을 준비합시다.
(4월 5주 정리 & 5월 1주 준비)

1. 이란 전쟁
이란은 전쟁을 통해서 붕괴 직전입니다.
이란이 호르무즈를 막으려고 해서 미국도 호르무즈를 막았습니다.
이란으로 가는 유조선이 막히니 이란은 생산된 석유를 팔지못해 돈도 못벌고 원유 시추 시설이 중단될 위기에 놓여있습니다. 이런 상황에서 이란 외무부 장관이 강한척을 하지만 곧 붕괴될 것 입니다. 
제가 요약해놓은 내용을 토대로 나오는 뉴스들을 본다면 흔들림이 없으실 것 입니다.

"이란의 마음 한 줄 요약"  포스팅
https://t.co/IAQhKCAnMC

2. Open AI 매출 미충족(Feat. 쌤알트만 버블)
Open AI가 매출을 미충족 시킬 수 있다는 카더라가 뜨면서 시장이 조정을 받았습니다.
AI 버블은 쌤알트만으로부터 올 수 있지만 아직은 아니라고 말씀드렸으며 그 동안 시장이 많이 올라서 조정의 명분이 될 수 있다고 시장의 메커니즘을 이해하라고 말씀드렸었습니다.

"AI버블은 쌤알트만으로 부터 올 수 있습니다" 포스팅
https://t.co/NI4A9RiJ50

3. 빅테크 실적
$MSFT 마이크로소프트 
매출(Beat), EPS(Beat), 가이던스(약 Miss)

$AMZN 아마존
매출(강 Beat), EPS(강 Beat), 가이던스(Beat)

$META 메타
매출(Beat), EPS(Beat), 가이던스(비슷하지만 Capex 증가가 주가에 영향)

$GOOGL 구글
매출(Beat), EPS(강 Beat), 가이던스(Capex 증가했지만 클라우드 폭발적 성장)

$APPL 애플
매출(Beat), EPS(Beat), 가이던스(강 Beat)

4. 다음주 실적 
다음주에는 많은 종목들이 실적을 기다리고 있습니다.
올해초부터 지금까지의 차트를 보며 기관들의 의도와 포지션을 이해한다면 이번에 나오는 실적에 다른 주가 해석도 어렵지 않으실 것 입니다.

$PLTR 팔란티어 5월 5일 AM 5~6
$PIN 핀터레스트 5월 5일 AM 5~6
$SHOP 쇼피파이 5월 5일 PM 9:30
$AMD AMD 5월 6일 AM 5~6
$TEM 템퍼스AI 5월 6일 AM 5~6
$CPNG 쿠팡 5월 6일 AM 5~6
$APP 앱로빈 5월 7일 AM 5~6
$IONQ 아이온큐 5월 7일 AM 5~6
$INOD 이노데이터 5월 8일 AM 5~6

도움이 되셨다면  👍 좋아요와 
📷 리포스트 잊지마세요! 📷📷 😇😇
